meaning: n.[冶]低碳铸铁,钢性铸铁,半钢
examples: In the process of rough rolling, the alloy semisteel was chosen, and the unlimited chrome and molybdenum chilled iron roll material was used in the process of fine rolling.
The recovery quantity of converter gas got increased in semisteel steelmaking process by means of optimizing oxygen feeding, improving operation level, reforming gas recovery system.
Using carburizing agent and devulcanized agent, experiment of carburisation and desulphuration for semisteel which in smelting high titanium slag by electric cooker has been studied.
